candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue label; matches total revenue/sales concept directly and is populated across years.
Not revenue; cost component.
Not revenue; cost line.
Not revenue; cost line.

candidates.why: Bottom-line income, not revenue.
Comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income subtotal, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.
Liability/deferred income, not top-line revenue.
Deferred income liability, not reported revenue line.

candidates.row_label: Contract Liabilities - Short-Term - Advance Consideration & Progress Billings in Excess of Unbilled Revenue
candidates.why: Contract liability, not recognized revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total revenue line from the candidate list.

candidates.why: Direct cost line and most explicit COGS label; populated across years.
Generic alternative, but appears unpopulated and less direct than Cost of goods sold.
Also a valid COGS label, but duplicates Cost of goods sold values; prefer the cleaner primary label.
Only a depreciation component of COGS, not total COGS.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods sold - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row; explicitly excluded when a direct line exists.

variables.notes: Used the primary direct cost line rather than duplicate/derived COGS labels.

candidates.why: Core selling overhead component above operating profit.
Core administrative overhead component above operating profit.
Likely overhead bucket above operating profit; suitable SG&A component.
Dedicated R&D expense above operating profit; should also be included in XSGA_COMPONENTS when separate so XSGA-XRD removes it.
Capitalization is not an operating expense component to include in SG&A.
Adjustment row, not the primary reported expense.
Explicit SG&A row exists but appears empty in preview; could serve as fallback for years where populated.
Personnel overhead-like line, but likely overlaps with selling/admin/R&D and risks double counting.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet gross asset, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: An explicit SG&A row exists but appears empty, so per rule (b) included it plus populated overhead buckets. Added Research and development costs because it is separately reported above operating profit and not clearly embedded in the selected SG&A buckets; this allows XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD to exclude R&D.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above operating profit; best match.
Capitalization/offset, not the primary expense line for XRD.
Amortization of capitalized development, not current R&D expense.
Only a component of R&D, and unpopulated here.
Adjustment row, not primary reported R&D expense.

candidates.why: Supplemental amortization, not current R&D expense.
Asset, not expense.
Asset gross amount, not expense.
Balance sheet accumulated amortization, not reported current R&D expense line.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost bucket; valid fallback but less granular than underlying recurring components.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expenses on Capital Financing, Gross
candidates.why: Explicit interest expense component; recurring financing cost.
Recurring finance-cost component; include with other granular finance items when no evidence it is one-off.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Explicit lease-interest component; recurring financing cost.
Generic interest label but unpopulated; less useful than specific populated rows.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease-interest line; avoid double counting.
Liability balance, not interest expense.
Accrued liability, not the income-statement expense flow.
Liability balance, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expenses on Capital Financing, Gross
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Used granular recurring financing-cost components instead of the broader Financial expenses total to avoid mixing in non-interest items and to follow the granularity rule.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders
candidates.why: Preferred owner/parent equity label excluding non-controlling interests.
Valid fallback if owner-attributable equity is unavailable in a year.
Potentially includes minority interest; less preferred for BE because BE should exclude MIB.
Balance sheet total, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred parent-attributable equity first to exclude any non-controlling interests; included Total Equity as fallback for years where the owner-attributable label is absent.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement subtotal, not a balance sheet minority-interest equity line.
Combined total equity and minority interest, not a standalone NCI line; using it would double count with BE.

variables.notes: No standalone minority interest/non-controlling interests line is present on the balance sheet. Left empty to avoid double counting, especially since BE includes a parent-equity fallback and total equity appears to equal total equity plus minority interest in the preview.
